title: Docker Compose Service Port Mappings Validation Bug Fixer

statement.markdown: Given a Docker Compose configuration, validate service port mappings. Each service should have a unique port. The validation should consider exposed ports, published ports, and container ports. The function should return `true` if valid and `false` otherwise. Note that the input configuration is a JSON object with services as properties and their respective port mappings as values. Also, consider that some services might have environment variables that override default port mappings.
statement.inputFormat: JSON object with services and their port mappings
statement.outputFormat: boolean (true for valid, false for invalid)
statement.notes: Assume environment variables override default port mappings

hints.text: Iterate over services and their port mappings
